---
title: "Playlist"
format: html
---

::: {.playlist-page}

(playlist) = *f*(time, weather, mood)

::: {.playlist-header}
<div class="playlist-intro">
  <div class="playlist-tags">J-rock | shoegaze | dream pop | alt rock | pop punk | classical</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.playlist-list}
(01) ONE OK ROCK  
(02) RADWIMPS  
(03) Vaundy  
(04) 米津玄師  
(05) 椎名林檎  
(06) 東京事変  
(07) きのこ帝国  
(08) Ichiko Aoba  
(09) My Hair is Bad  
(10) back number  
(11) ヨルシカ  
(12) indigo la End  
(13) King Gnu  
(14) YOASOBI  
(15) 宇多田ヒカル  
(16) あいみょん  
(17) Linkin Park  
(18) Green Day  
(19) Bob Dylan  
(20) Mozart  
:::

::: {.playlist-notes}
A mix of Japanese rock, shoegaze, dream pop, alt rock, pop punk, and a little classical music.
:::

:::
